title: AzurCraft
description: A.k.a. Azur Lane MC - adapts concepts from the mobile game of the same name into Minecraft!
body:
**AzurCraft (aka AL MC) is a Fabric mod that, in full scope, emphasizes exploration, resource management, siege mechanics, and NPC interaction.**

For a full roadmap, please check this post on my Patreon: [AL MC Roadmap thru 1.0](https://www.patreon.com/posts/azur-lane-mc-1-0-140932769?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link)


As the steward of your Minecraft world, you will be given the opportunity (and responsibility) of managing a fleet of anthropomorphic naval vessels. Manufacture weaponry, utilities, and ammunition to supply a ship adequately, so that she can safely explore, gather resources, and even defend the living against all manner of mobs (drowned, guardians.... and even the elusive Siren).

Deployment is only half of the story. You'll also need to keep an eye on morale and interpersonal relationships. Build and design dormitories that cater to the preferences of each ship... watch as they interact with each other and form bonds that can strengthen (or devastate) them in combat... and also keep an eye out for logistics. You won't be alone, as you can recruit adorable creatures to help you manage food, fuel, production, and the emotional disaster from losing a party member in combat! (Unlike the mobile game, you will need to be strategic about who you send out, because NPC death is a real risk in this mod!)

**Come aboard, Commander, and test your fleet-managing chops in this mod!**


### Recommended:

- Big Globe (for exploration and world scale)
- Iris (for shaders; recommended to use Vanilla configurations or MakeUp)
- Roughly Enough Items (for quick recipe access)
- Sodium (for optimization)
- Xaero's Minimap and World Map (for entity tracking)


_For commentary/questions about bugs or future releases, use comments or GitHub issue tickets. A wiki for this mod is available at GitHub._

_This mod is currently in pre-release stage and is undergoing regular development. Not all roadmap features have been implemented yet. There may be dramatic changes between editions during this period._
